# LLMs Crawl Policy for https://yt1s.cx
# Update contact and domain before release.

User-agent: GPTBot
Allow: /
Crawl-Delay: 5

User-agent: Claude-Web
Allow: /
Crawl-Delay: 5

User-agent: PerplexityBot
Allow: /
Crawl-Delay: 5

User-agent: Google-Extended
Allow: /
Crawl-Delay: 5

User-agent: *
Disallow: /build-output.log
Disallow: /preview.log
